mapper.select: SELECT * FROM service_hour_replenish ORDER BY apply_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.volunteer_id as volunteerId, r.activity_name as activityName, r.hours, r.earned_points as earnedPoints, r.reason, r.evidence_files as evidenceFiles, r.status, r.reject_reason as rejectReason, r.admin_id as adminId, r.apply_time as applyTime, r.audit_time as auditTime, r.create_time as createdAt, r.update_time as updateTime, v.real_name as volunteerName, v.username as volunteerUsername FROM service_hour_replenish r LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON r.volunteer_id = v.id ORDER BY r.apply_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO service_hour_replenish (volunteer_id, activity_name, hours, earned_points, reason, evidence_files, status, apply_time) VALUES (#{volunteerId}, #{activityName}, #{hours}, #{earnedPoints}, #{reason}, #{evidenceFiles}, #{status}, #{applyTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE service_hour_replenish SET activity_name = #{activityName}, hours = #{hours}, earned_points = #{earnedPoints}, reason = #{reason}, evidence_files = #{evidenceFiles}, status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, admin_id = #{adminId}, audit_time = #{auditTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE service_hour_replenish SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, admin_id = #{adminId}, audit_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM service_hour_replenish WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hours), 0) FROM service_hour_replenish WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = '已通过'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(earned_points), 0) FROM service_hour_replenish WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = '已通过'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_hour_replenish WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = '已通过'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hours), 0) FROM service_hour_replenish WHERE status = '已通过'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hours), 0) FROM service_hour_replenish WHERE status = '已通过' AND create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(audit_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') as date, HOUR(audit_time) as hour, COALESCE(SUM(hours), 0) as hours FROM service_hour_replenish WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = '已通过' AND audit_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(audit_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00'), HOUR(audit_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(audit_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, DAYOFWEEK(audit_time) as dayOfWeek, COALESCE(SUM(hours), 0) as hours FROM service_hour_replenish WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = '已通过' AND audit_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{weeks} WEEK) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(audit_time, '%Y-%m-%d'), DAYOFWEEK(audit_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(audit_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, DAY(audit_time) as day, COALESCE(SUM(hours), 0) as hours FROM service_hour_replenish WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = '已通过' AND audit_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(audit_time, '%Y-%m-%d'), DAY(audit_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(audit_time, '%Y-%m') as month, MONTH(audit_time) as monthNum, COALESCE(SUM(hours), 0) as hours FROM service_hour_replenish WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = '已通过' AND audit_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{years} YEAR) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(audit_time, '%Y-%m'), MONTH(audit_time) ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(earned_points), 0) FROM service_hour_replenish WHERE status = '已通过'
